name: aws-solution-architect
description: Expert AWS solution architecture for startups focusing on serverless, scalable, and cost-effective cloud infrastructure with modern DevOps practices and infrastructure-as-code
capabilities: Generate architecture patterns for serverless, microservices, and three-tier applications
Create production-ready CloudFormation, AWS CDK, and Terraform templates
Analyze AWS spending and recommend cost optimization strategies
Design multi-region high availability and disaster recovery architectures
Provide compliance guidance for HIPAA, SOC 2, and GDPR requirements
author: alirezarezvani
securitySummary: All static findings are false positives. The skill generates AWS infrastructure templates locally without network calls or external commands. Detected patterns are standard AWS terminology (Cognito service), IAM policy version dates, and documentation examples for CLI tools. No credential exfiltration, no command injection, no malicious behavior.
valueStatement: Design production-ready AWS architectures with serverless patterns, cost optimization strategies, and infrastructure-as-code templates. Generate CloudFormation, CDK, and Terraform configurations for deployment.
limitations: Does not execute or deploy infrastructure - generates templates only
Requires AWS account and manual deployment by the user
Cannot access real AWS resources or billing data without user input
Recommendations are based on best practices, not live resource analysis

useCases.title: Design MVP architecture
useCases.description: Create cost-effective serverless architecture for launch with auto-scaling and minimal operational overhead

useCases.title: Generate IaC templates
useCases.description: Produce CloudFormation, CDK, or Terraform configurations for production deployment pipelines

useCases.title: Optimize cloud costs
useCases.description: Analyze spending patterns and receive actionable recommendations to reduce AWS bills by 20-40%

promptTemplates.title: Basic Architecture
promptTemplates.prompt: Design a serverless API backend for a mobile app with 100k users using Lambda, API Gateway, and DynamoDB

promptTemplates.title: Cost Optimization
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze my AWS setup and recommend ways to reduce costs by 30%. I am currently spending $2000/month on EC2 and RDS

promptTemplates.title: Infrastructure as Code
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a CloudFormation template for a three-tier web application with auto-scaling, RDS, and ElastiCache

promptTemplates.title: Event-Driven Architecture
promptTemplates.prompt: Design an event-driven microservices architecture using EventBridge, Step Functions, and SQS for an e-commerce platform

bestPractices: Start with serverless patterns for MVPs to minimize costs and operational overhead
Use infrastructure-as-code (CloudFormation, CDK, or Terraform) for all deployments
Implement multi-layer security: VPC isolation, IAM least privilege, encryption at rest and in transit
antiPatterns: Avoid over-engineering early - do not build for 10M users when you have 100
Do not use On-Demand pricing for predictable workloads - use Savings Plans or Reserved Instances
Never hardcode credentials - use IAM roles and AWS Secrets Manager instead

faq.question: Does this skill deploy resources to my AWS account?
faq.answer: No. The skill generates infrastructure-as-code templates that you manually deploy using AWS CLI or console.

faq.question: What AWS services are supported?
faq.answer: Lambda, API Gateway, DynamoDB, S3, CloudFront, Cognito, RDS, ECS Fargate, EventBridge, Step Functions, and 20+ other services.

faq.question: Can this analyze my current AWS spending?
faq.answer: Yes, provide your resource inventory and monthly spend, and the skill will recommend specific cost optimizations.

faq.question: Does this work with multi-cloud setups?
faq.answer: Primarily AWS-focused. Terraform templates can be adapted for Azure or GCP with manual modifications.

faq.question: What compliance frameworks are covered?
faq.answer: HIPAA for healthcare, SOC 2 for security, GDPR for EU data residency, and PCI-DSS for payments.

faq.question: How do I deploy the generated templates?
faq.answer: Use AWS CLI for CloudFormation, npm/CDK CLI for CDK stacks, or Terraform CLI. Each template includes instructions.
